title: Magcannon Max
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Magcannon Max''' was a three-story self-contained [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] defense weapon developed after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It contained a complete targeting and [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] system that had the ability to independently locate and destroy [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]] tried to sell this piece of artillery to the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[Lizil|nest]] [[Lizil (Hive)|Lizil]] as an attempt to get to the front lines of the [[Swarm War]] at [[Tenupe]]. When Lizil would not purchase it, they attempted to sell it to the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]]. When this too failed, they sold the Magcannon to a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
